meta.title: INL's Survey of ICS Security Tools
meta.description:
INL attempted to catalog the ICS security products or tools  beginning with 60 tools. They broke these products down by the zone(s) the tool would reside in and six categories of tools they defined.

Carl Hurd of INL presented the approach,  the results and where this project could expand to in the future.
